<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>KAIPRO Consulting | Transformamos datos en rentabilidad</title>
<meta name="description" content="Ayudamos a empresas de alimentos y manufactura en Ecuador a identificar y eliminar pérdidas operacionales mediante procesos, indicadores y mejora continua.">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --navy:#142850;
    --navy-2:#1a3a6b;
    --teal:#1aa7c7;
    --teal-light:#5fd3ee;
    --bg:#f5f8fb;
    --bg-card:#ffffff;
    --ink:#1c2330;
    --ink-soft:#5b6675;
    --line:rgba(20,40,80,0.08);
    --radius:14px;
  }

  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}

  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}

  body{
    font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
    background:var(--bg);
    color:var(--ink);
    line-height:1.6;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }

  h1,h2,h3,.logo-word{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-weight:600;
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
    color:var(--navy);
  }

  a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;}
  img{max-width:100%;display:block;}

  .container{
    width:100%;
    max-width:1140px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:0 24px;
  }

  /* ===== HEADER ===== */
  header{
    position:sticky;
    top:0;
    z-index:100;
    background:rgba(245,248,251,0.85);
    backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .nav{
    position:relative;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    padding:16px 24px;
    max-width:1140px;
    margin:0 auto;
  }
  .brand{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:10px;
  }
  .brand-mark{width:34px;height:34px;}
  .brand-text{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:18px;
    letter-spacing:0.04em;
    color:var(--navy);
  }
  .brand-text span{color:var(--teal);}
  .nav-links{
    display:flex;
    gap:32px;
    font-size:15px;
    font-weight:500;
  }
  .nav-links a{
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    transition:color 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--teal);}
  .nav-cta{
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    background:var(--navy);
    color:#fff;
    padding:10px 20px;
    border-radius:30px;
    font-size:14px;
    font-weight:600;
    transition:background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover{background:var(--teal); transform:translateY(-1px);}
  .menu-toggle{display:none;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;padding:6px;}
  .menu-toggle span{
    display:block;width:24px;height:2px;background:var(--navy);margin:5px 0;border-radius:2px;
  }

  /* ===== HERO ===== */
  .hero{
    padding:80px 0 100px;
    overflow:hidden;
    position:relative;
  }
  .hero-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.1fr 0.9fr;
    gap:60px;
    align-items:center;
  }
  .eyebrow{
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    font-size:13px;
    font-weight:600;
    letter-spacing:0.12em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--teal);
    background:rgba(26,167,199,0.08);
    border:1px solid rgba(26,167,199,0.2);
    padding:6px 14px;
    border-radius:30px;
    margin-bottom:24px;
  }
  .eyebrow::before{
    content:'';
    width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--teal);
    display:inline-block;
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(34px, 5vw, 54px);
    line-height:1.12;
    margin-bottom:22px;
  }
  .hero h1 em{
    font-style:normal;
    color:var(--teal);
    position:relative;
  }
  .hero p.lead{
    font-size:18px;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    max-width:520px;
    margin-bottom:32px;
  }
  .hero-actions{
    display:flex;
    gap:16px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .btn{
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:10px;
    padding:15px 28px;
    border-radius:30px;
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:15px;
    transition:transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, background 0.2s;
    border:1px solid transparent;
    cursor:pointer;
  }
  .btn-primary{
    background:var(--navy);
    color:#fff;
    box-shadow:0 10px 24px -10px rgba(20,40,80,0.5);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover{
    background:var(--teal);
    transform:translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow:0 14px 28px -10px rgba(26,167,199,0.5);
  }
  .btn-ghost{
    background:transparent;
    color:var(--navy);
    border-color:var(--line);
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover{
    border-color:var(--teal);
    color:var(--teal);
    transform:translateY(-2px);
  }
  .btn svg{width:18px;height:18px;flex-shrink:0;}

  .hero-stats{
    display:flex;
    gap:36px;
    margin-top:48px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .hero-stat .num{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-size:28px;
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--navy);
    line-height:1;
  }
  .hero-stat .num span{color:var(--teal);}
  .hero-stat .label{
    font-size:13px;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    margin-top:4px;
  }

  /* ===== HERO VISUAL: ANIMATED K ===== */
  .hero-visual{
    position:relative;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
  }
  .k-card{
    background:var(--bg-card);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:24px;
    padding:40px;
    box-shadow:0 24px 60px -30px rgba(20,40,80,0.25);
    width:100%;
    max-width:420px;
  }
  .k-svg-wrap{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    margin-bottom:8px;
    position:relative;
    min-height:240px;
  }
  .k-logo-reveal{
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    opacity:0;
    transform:scale(0.92);
    animation:logoFadeIn 0.8s ease-out 4.4s forwards;
  }
  .k-logo-reveal img{
    width:auto;
    height:100%;
    max-width:100%;
    object-fit:contain;
    filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 16px rgba(20,40,80,0.12));
  }
  .k-svg-anim{
    animation:svgFadeOut 0.6s ease-in 4.2s forwards;
  }
  @keyframes svgFadeOut{ to{ opacity:0; transform:scale(0.94); } }
  @keyframes logoFadeIn{ to{ opacity:1; transform:scale(1); } }

  @keyframes drawLeg{ to{ opacity:1; } }
  @keyframes drawStroke{ to{ stroke-dashoffset:0; } }
  @keyframes fadeIn{ to{ opacity:1; } }
  @keyframes popIn{
    0%{opacity:0; transform:scale(0.3);}
    70%{opacity:1; transform:scale(1.15);}
    100%{transform:scale(1);}
  }
  @keyframes pulseNode{
    0%,100%{ transform:scale(1); filter:none; }
    50%{ transform:scale(1.12); filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(26,167,199,0.6)); }
  }
  @keyframes floatCard{
    0%,100%{ transform:translateY(0); }
    50%{ transform:translateY(-6px); }
  }

  .k-leg{ opacity:0; animation:drawLeg 0.6s ease-out 0.2s forwards; }
  .k-diag{ stroke-dasharray:220; stroke-dashoffset:220; animation:drawStroke 0.8s ease-out 0.9s forwards; }
  .k-arrow-shaft{ stroke-dasharray:240; stroke-dashoffset:240; animation:drawStroke 0.9s ease-out 1.7s forwards; }
  .k-arrowhead{ opacity:0; animation:fadeIn 0.4s ease-out 2.5s forwards; }
  .k-connector{ stroke-dasharray:80; stroke-dashoffset:80; animation:drawStroke 0.5s ease-out 2.9s forwards; }
  .k-node-small{ opacity:0; animation:fadeIn 0.3s ease-out 2.8s forwards; }
  .k-node-big{
    opacity:0;
    animation:popIn 0.5s ease-out 3.2s forwards, pulseNode 2.4s ease-in-out 3.8s infinite;
    transform-box:fill-box;
    transform-origin:center;
  }
  .k-floating{ animation:floatCard 5s ease-in-out infinite; }

  .metric-row{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    align-items:flex-end;
    margin-top:28px;
    padding-top:24px;
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .metric{
    text-align:left;
  }
  .metric .metric-label{
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:0.08em;
    margin-bottom:4px;
  }
  .metric .metric-value{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-size:22px;
    font-weight:700;
  }
  .metric.before .metric-value{color:#b0414c;}
  .metric.after .metric-value{color:var(--teal);}
  .metric-arrow{
    color:var(--teal);
    font-size:20px;
    padding-bottom:6px;
  }

  /* ===== SECTION GENERIC ===== */
  section{padding:90px 0;}
  .section-head{
    max-width:640px;
    margin-bottom:56px;
  }
  .section-head .eyebrow{margin-bottom:18px;}
  .section-head h2{
    font-size:clamp(28px, 4vw, 38px);
    line-height:1.2;
    margin-bottom:14px;
  }
  .section-head p{
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    font-size:16px;
  }

  /* ===== PROBLEMA / VALUE ===== */
  .problem{
    background:var(--bg-card);
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .problem-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
    gap:28px;
  }
  .problem-card{
    background:var(--bg);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    padding:28px;
    transition:transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s, border-color 0.25s;
  }
  .problem-card:hover{
    transform:translateY(-4px);
    border-color:rgba(26,167,199,0.35);
    box-shadow:0 16px 32px -20px rgba(20,40,80,0.25);
  }
  .problem-icon{
    width:44px;height:44px;
    border-radius:12px;
    background:rgba(26,167,199,0.1);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    margin-bottom:18px;
    color:var(--teal);
  }
  .problem-icon svg{width:22px;height:22px;}
  .problem-card h3{
    font-size:17px;
    margin-bottom:8px;
  }
  .problem-card p{
    font-size:14.5px;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
  }

  /* ===== SERVICIOS / ESCALERA ===== */
  .ladder{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
    gap:24px;
    align-items:stretch;
  }
  .service-card{
    background:var(--bg-card);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:18px;
    padding:32px;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    position:relative;
    transition:transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;
  }
  .service-card:hover{
    transform:translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow:0 24px 48px -28px rgba(20,40,80,0.3);
  }
  .service-card.featured{
    border:2px solid var(--teal);
    box-shadow:0 28px 60px -28px rgba(26,167,199,0.45);
    transform:scale(1.03);
    z-index:2;
  }
  .service-card.featured:hover{
    transform:scale(1.03) translateY(-6px);
  }
  .service-badge{
    position:absolute;
    top:-13px;
    left:32px;
    background:var(--teal);
    color:#fff;
    font-size:12px;
    font-weight:600;
    letter-spacing:0.06em;
    padding:6px 16px;
    border-radius:30px;
    box-shadow:0 8px 16px -8px rgba(26,167,199,0.6);
  }
  .service-tag{
    font-size:12px;
    font-weight:600;
    letter-spacing:0.1em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--teal);
    margin-bottom:14px;
  }
  .service-card.featured .service-tag{margin-top:6px;}
  .service-card h3{
    font-size:21px;
    margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .service-price{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-size:26px;
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--navy);
    margin-bottom:18px;
  }
  .service-price small{
    font-size:13px;
    font-weight:500;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
  }
  .service-card p.desc{
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    font-size:14.5px;
    margin-bottom:20px;
  }
  .service-list{
    list-style:none;
    margin-bottom:20px;
    flex-grow:1;
  }
  .service-list li{
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-start;
    gap:10px;
    font-size:14.5px;
    color:var(--ink);
    margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .service-list li svg{
    width:18px;height:18px;
    color:var(--teal);
    flex-shrink:0;
    margin-top:1px;
  }
  .service-outcome{
    font-size:13.5px;
    font-weight:500;
    color:var(--navy);
    background:rgba(26,167,199,0.08);
    border-left:3px solid var(--teal);
    border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;
    padding:12px 14px;
    margin-bottom:20px;
  }
  .featured-outcome{
    background:rgba(26,167,199,0.12);
    border-left-color:var(--navy);
    color:var(--navy);
  }
  .service-btn{
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    gap:8px;
    padding:13px 20px;
    border-radius:30px;
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:14px;
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    color:var(--navy);
    transition:all 0.2s;
  }
  .service-card.featured .service-btn{
    background:var(--navy);
    color:#fff;
    border-color:var(--navy);
    font-size:15px;
    padding:15px 20px;
  }
  .service-btn:hover{
    background:var(--teal);
    color:#fff;
    border-color:var(--teal);
    transform:translateY(-1px);
  }
  .services-trust{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:center;
    gap:32px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    margin-top:48px;
    padding-top:32px;
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .trust-item{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    font-size:13.5px;
    font-weight:500;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
  }
  .trust-item svg{
    width:18px;height:18px;
    color:var(--teal);
    flex-shrink:0;
  }

  /* ===== CUSTOMER JOURNEY / METODO ===== */
  .journey{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);
    gap:0;
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
  }
  .journey-step{
    padding:24px 20px;
    border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  }
  .journey-step:nth-child(4n){border-right:none;}
  .journey-step .step-num{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-size:13px;
    color:var(--teal-light);
    font-weight:600;
    margin-bottom:10px;
    letter-spacing:0.08em;
  }
  .journey-step h4{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-size:16px;
    font-weight:600;
    margin-bottom:6px;
    color:#fff;
  }
  .journey-step p{
    font-size:13.5px;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  }

  /* ===== SOBRE NOSOTROS ===== */
  .about-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
    gap:60px;
    align-items:center;
  }
  .about-text p{
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    margin-bottom:18px;
    font-size:16px;
  }
  .principles{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
    gap:14px;
    margin-top:8px;
  }
  .principle{
    background:var(--bg-card);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:12px;
    padding:16px 18px;
    font-size:13.5px;
    font-weight:500;
    color:var(--navy);
  }
  .founders{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:20px;
  }
  .founder-card{
    background:var(--bg-card);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:18px;
    padding:24px;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:18px;
  }
  .founder-avatar{
    width:60px;height:60px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy), var(--teal));
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    color:#fff;
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:20px;
    flex-shrink:0;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .founder-avatar img{
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
  }
  .founder-info h4{
    font-size:17px;
    color:var(--navy);
    margin-bottom:2px;
  }
  .founder-info p{
    font-size:13.5px;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
  }

  /* ===== CONTACTO ===== */
  .contact{
    background:linear-gradient(180deg, #eef3f8 0%, var(--bg) 100%);
  }
  .contact-card{
    background:var(--navy);
    border-radius:24px;
    padding:56px;
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1fr;
    gap:48px;
    align-items:center;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    color:#fff;
  }
  .contact-card::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    bottom:-160px; left:-100px;
    width:380px; height:380px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(26,167,199,0.25), transparent 70%);
  }
  .contact-card h2{
    color:#fff;
    font-size:clamp(26px,3.6vw,34px);
    margin-bottom:14px;
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
  }
  .contact-card p{
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
    font-size:15.5px;
    margin-bottom:28px;
    max-width:440px;
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
  }
  .contact-actions{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:14px;
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
  }
  .contact-channel{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:14px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:16px 20px;
    transition:background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .contact-channel:hover{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    transform:translateX(4px);
  }
  .contact-channel .ic{
    width:42px;height:42px;
    border-radius:10px;
    background:var(--teal);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .contact-channel .ic svg{width:22px;height:22px;color:var(--navy);}
  .contact-channel .ch-label{
    font-size:12px;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:0.08em;
    margin-bottom:2px;
  }
  .contact-channel .ch-value{
    font-size:15px;
    font-weight:600;
  }
  .contact-side{
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:16px;
  }
  .contact-side .k-mini-wrap{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:center;
    opacity:0.9;
  }
  .ideal-client{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:20px;
    font-size:13.5px;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  }
  .ideal-client strong{color:#fff;}

  /* ===== FOOTER ===== */
  footer{
    padding:36px 0;
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .footer-row{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    align-items:center;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    gap:16px;
  }
  .footer-row .brand-text{font-size:15px;}
  .footer-tag{
    font-size:13px;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
  }

  /* ===== WHATSAPP FLOAT ===== */
  .wa-float{
    position:fixed;
    bottom:24px;
    right:24px;
    z-index:200;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:10px;
    background:#1aa7c7;
    color:#fff;
    padding:14px 22px 14px 14px;
    border-radius:50px;
    box-shadow:0 12px 30px -10px rgba(26,167,199,0.6);
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:14.5px;
    transition:transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  }
  .wa-float:hover{
    transform:translateY(-3px) scale(1.03);
    box-shadow:0 16px 36px -10px rgba(26,167,199,0.7);
  }
  .wa-float svg{width:24px;height:24px;}
  .wa-float .wa-ping{
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    border-radius:50px;
    border:2px solid #1aa7c7;
    animation:wa-pulse 2.2s ease-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes wa-pulse{
    0%{transform:scale(1); opacity:0.7;}
    100%{transform:scale(1.35); opacity:0;}
  }

  /* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
  @media (max-width: 880px){
    .hero-grid, .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .hero-visual{order:-1;}
    .problem-grid, .ladder{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .service-card.featured{transform:none; order:-1;}
    .service-card.featured:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);}
    .journey{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
    .journey-step:nth-child(2n){border-right:none;}
    .journey-step:nth-child(-n+2){border-top:none;}
    .contact-card{grid-template-columns:1fr; padding:36px 24px;}
    .contact-side{order:-1;}
    .nav-links{
      display:none;
      position:absolute;
      top:100%; left:0; right:0;
      flex-direction:column;
      gap:0;
      background:var(--bg);
      border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
      padding:8px 24px 16px;
    }
    .nav-links.open{display:flex;}
    .nav-links a{padding:12px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}
    .nav-links a:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
    .menu-toggle{display:block;}
    .nav-cta{display:none;}
  }
  @media (max-width: 540px){
    .hero{padding:50px 0 60px;}
    .hero-stats{gap:24px;}
    section{padding:60px 0;}
    .contact-card{padding:28px 20px;}
    .k-card{padding:24px;}
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    .k-leg,.k-diag,.k-arrow-shaft,.k-arrowhead,.k-connector,.k-node-small,.k-node-big{
      animation:none !important; opacity:1 !important; stroke-dashoffset:0 !important;
    }
    .k-floating{animation:none !important;}
    .wa-float .wa-ping{animation:none !important;}
    .reveal{opacity:1 !important; transform:none !important; transition:none !important;}
  }

  /* ===== DARK SECTIONS WITH EXECUTIVE MEETING BACKGROUND ===== */
  .section-dark{
    position:relative;
    color:#fff;
    background-color:var(--navy);
    background-size:cover;
    background-position:center;
    overflow:hidden;
    isolation:isolate;
  }
  .section-dark::before{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    background:linear-gradient(120deg, rgba(10,22,46,0.78) 10%, rgba(20,40,80,0.68) 45%, rgba(26,167,199,0.4) 100%);
    z-index:0;
  }
  .section-dark::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    top:-220px; right:-180px;
    width:520px; height:520px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(95,211,238,0.22), transparent 70%);
    z-index:0;
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  .section-dark > .container{position:relative; z-index:1;}
  .section-dark .section-head h2,
  .section-dark .section-head p,
  .section-dark h2, .section-dark h3{color:#fff;}
  .section-dark .section-head p{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.68);}
  .section-dark .eyebrow{
    color:var(--teal-light);
    background:rgba(95,211,238,0.12);
    border-color:rgba(95,211,238,0.28);
  }
  .section-dark .eyebrow::before{background:var(--teal-light);}

  .bg-meeting-1{background-image:linear-gradient(120deg, rgba(10,22,46,0.78) 10%, rgba(20,40,80,0.68) 45%, rgba(26,167,199,0.38) 100%), url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556761175-5973dc0f32e7?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=60');}
  .bg-meeting-2{background-image:linear-gradient(110deg, rgba(8,18,40,0.78) 15%, rgba(20,40,80,0.65) 55%, rgba(26,167,199,0.35) 100%), url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521737711867-e3b97375f902?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=60');}
  .bg-meeting-3{background-image:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(8,18,40,0.8) 10%, rgba(20,40,80,0.7) 50%, rgba(26,167,199,0.38) 100%), url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1573164713988-8665fc963095?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=60');}
  .bg-meeting-4{background-image:linear-gradient(125deg, rgba(10,22,46,0.82) 10%, rgba(20,40,80,0.7) 50%, rgba(26,167,199,0.4) 100%), url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542744173-8e7e53415bb0?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=60');}

  /* ===== LIGHT SECTIONS WITH SUBTLE EXECUTIVE BACKGROUND ===== */
  .section-light-photo{
    position:relative;
    background-size:cover;
    background-position:center;
    background-color:var(--bg);
    overflow:hidden;
    isolation:isolate;
  }
  .section-light-photo::before{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    background:linear-gradient(115deg, rgba(245,248,251,0.94) 25%, rgba(245,248,251,0.8) 60%, rgba(238,243,248,0.55) 100%);
    z-index:0;
  }
  .section-light-photo > .container{position:relative; z-index:1;}

  .bg-meeting-light-1{background-image:url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556761175-5973dc0f32e7?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=60');}
  .bg-meeting-light-2{background-image:url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521737711867-e3b97375f902?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=60');}

  .problem-card.on-dark{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
  }
  .problem-card.on-dark p{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);}
  .problem-card.on-dark:hover{
    border-color:rgba(95,211,238,0.4);
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  }
  .problem-card.on-dark .problem-icon{
    background:rgba(95,211,238,0.15);
    color:var(--teal-light);
  }
  .principle.on-dark{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.14);
    color:#fff;
  }

  /* ===== SCROLL REVEAL ANIMATIONS ===== */
  .reveal{
    opacity:0;
    transform:translateY(28px);
    transition:opacity 0.7s cubic-bezier(.2,.65,.3,1), transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(.2,.65,.3,1);
  }
  .reveal.is-visible{opacity:1; transform:translateY(0);}
  .reveal-stagger > * {
    opacity:0;
    transform:translateY(24px);
    transition:opacity 0.6s cubic-bezier(.2,.65,.3,1), transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(.2,.65,.3,1);
  }
  .reveal-stagger.is-visible > *{opacity:1; transform:translateY(0);}
  .reveal-stagger.is-visible > *:nth-child(1){transition-delay:0s;}
  .reveal-stagger.is-visible > *:nth-child(2){transition-delay:0.1s;}
  .reveal-stagger.is-visible > *:nth-child(3){transition-delay:0.2s;}
  .reveal-stagger.is-visible > *:nth-child(4){transition-delay:0.3s;}

  /* subtle continuous shimmer on featured price */
  @keyframes shimmer{
    0%{background-position:-200px 0;}
    100%{background-position:200px 0;}
  }
  .service-card.featured .service-price{
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--navy) 40%, var(--teal) 50%, var(--navy) 60%);
    background-size:400px 100%;
    -webkit-background-clip:text;
    background-clip:text;
    color:transparent;
    animation:shimmer 4s linear infinite;
  }

  /* nav link underline animation */
  .nav-links a{position:relative;}
  .nav-links a::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    left:0; bottom:-6px;
    width:0; height:2px;
    background:var(--teal);
    transition:width 0.25s ease;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover::after{width:100%;}

  /* journey step hover lift */
  .journey-step{transition:background 0.25s, transform 0.25s;}
  .journey-step:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04); transform:translateY(-3px);}

  /* founder card hover */
  .founder-card{transition:transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;}
  .founder-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 18px 36px -22px rgba(20,40,80,0.3);}

  /* contact channel icon pulse on hover */
  .contact-channel .ic{transition:transform 0.25s;}
  .contact-channel:hover .ic{transform:scale(1.1) rotate(-4deg);}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ===== HEADER ===== -->
<header>
  <nav class="nav">
    <a href="#inicio" class="brand">
      <svg class="brand-mark" viewBox="0 0 100 100" role="img" aria-label="Logo KAIPRO">
        <rect x="22" y="14" width="20" height="56" rx="3" fill="#142850"/>
        <path d="M30 56 L58 28 L70 28" fill="none" stroke="#142850" stroke-width="9" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        <path d="M30 70 L78 24" fill="none" stroke="#1aa7c7" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
        <path d="M70 18 L84 14 L80 28 Z" fill="#1aa7c7"/>
        <line x1="60" y1="46" x2="74" y2="60" stroke="#1aa7c7" stroke-width="3"/>
        <circle cx="60" cy="46" r="5" fill="#1aa7c7"/>
        <circle cx="74" cy="60" r="7" fill="#1aa7c7"/>
      </svg>
      <span class="brand-text">KAI<span>PRO</span></span>
    </a>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="#inicio">Inicio</a>
      <a href="#servicios">Servicios</a>
      <a href="#nosotros">Sobre nosotros</a>
      <a href="#contacto">Contacto</a>
    </div>
    <a href="https://wa.me/593997199748?text=Hola%2C%20quiero%20agendar%20una%20reuni%C3%B3n%20exploratoria%20con%20KAIPRO" target="_blank" class="nav-cta">
      Agenda gratis
    </a>
    <button class="menu-toggle" aria-label="Abrir menú"><span></span><span></span><span></span></button>
  </nav>
</header>

<!-- ===== HERO ===== -->
<section class="hero" id="inicio">
  <div class="container hero-grid">
    <div class="hero-content reveal is-visible">
      <div class="eyebrow">Consultoría en rentabilidad operacional</div>
      <h1>Transformamos <em>datos</em> en rentabilidad</h1>
      <p class="lead">Ayudamos a empresas de alimentos y manufactura en Ecuador a identificar y eliminar pérdidas operacionales mediante procesos, indicadores y mejora continua.</p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="https://wa.me/593997199748?text=Hola%2C%20quiero%20agendar%20una%20reuni%C3%B3n%20exploratoria%20con%20KAIPRO" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12.04 2C6.58 2 2.13 6.45 2.13 11.91c0 1.75.46 3.45 1.32 4.95L2 22l5.25-1.38c1.45.79 3.08 1.21 4.78 1.21h.01c5.46 0 9.91-4.45 9.91-9.91 0-2.65-1.03-5.14-2.9-7.01A9.82 9.82 0 0 0 12.04 2m0 1.67c2.2 0 4.26.86 5.82 2.42a8.18 8.18 0 0 1 2.41 5.82c0 4.55-3.7 8.24-8.24 8.24-1.48 0-2.93-.39-4.19-1.15l-.3-.17-3.12.82.83-3.04-.2-.32a8.18 8.18 0 0 1-1.26-4.38c0-4.55 3.7-8.24 8.25-8.24M8.53 7.33c-.16 0-.42.06-.64.3-.23.24-.87.85-.87 2.07 0 1.22.89 2.4 1.01 2.57.13.16 1.76 2.83 4.43 3.85 2.21.85 2.66.7 3.14.66.48-.05 1.55-.63 1.77-1.25.22-.62.22-1.14.15-1.25-.06-.11-.23-.18-.48-.31-.25-.13-1.55-.77-1.79-.85-.24-.09-.42-.13-.59.13-.18.26-.68.85-.83 1.03-.15.17-.31.19-.56.06-.26-.13-1.07-.4-2.04-1.26-.75-.67-1.26-1.5-1.41-1.75-.15-.25-.02-.39.11-.52.13-.13.29-.34.43-.51.14-.17.19-.3.29-.49.1-.19.05-.36-.02-.51-.07-.15-.66-1.59-.89-2.07-.18-.39-.36-.39-.51-.4z"/></svg>
          Hablemos por WhatsApp
        </a>
        <a href="#servicios" class="btn btn-ghost">Ver servicios</a>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="hero-stat">
          <div class="num">20<span>-</span>100</div>
          <div class="label">Colaboradores: tamaño ideal de empresa</div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-stat">
          <div class="num">USD <span>10K+</span></div>
          <div class="label">Pérdidas ocultas detectadas en casos reales</div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-stat">
          <div class="num"><span>3</span> meses</div>
          <div class="label">Duración del Programa de Rentabilidad</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-visual reveal is-visible" style="transition-delay:0.2s">
      <div class="k-card k-floating">
        <div class="k-svg-wrap">
          <svg class="k-svg-anim" viewBox="0 0 400 320" width="100%" role="img" aria-label="Logo animado KAIPRO: la letra K se dibuja y un indicador de crecimiento pulsa">
            <title>KAIPRO — animación de crecimiento</title>
            <g class="k-leg">
              <rect x="100" y="40" width="70" height="200" rx="10" fill="#142850"/>
            </g>
            <path class="k-diag" d="M 125 195 L 205 115 L 232 115" fill="none" stroke="#142850" stroke-width="28" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
            <path class="k-arrow-shaft" d="M 125 250 L 270 105" fill="none" stroke="#1aa7c7" stroke-width="32" stroke-linecap="round"/>
            <path class="k-arrowhead" d="M 252 80 L 298 66 L 284 112 Z" fill="#1aa7c7"/>
            <line class="k-connector" x1="228" y1="178" x2="272" y2="222" stroke="#1aa7c7" stroke-width="5"/>
            <circle class="k-node-small" cx="228" cy="178" r="13" fill="#1aa7c7"/>
            <circle class="k-node-big" cx="272" cy="222" r="20" fill="#1aa7c7"/>
          </svg>
          <div class="k-logo-reveal">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="KAIPRO Consulting">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="metric-row">
          <div class="metric before">
            <div class="metric-label">Antes</div>
            <div class="metric-value">-18%</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-arrow">→</div>
          <div class="metric after">
            <div class="metric-label">Con KAIPRO</div>
            <div class="metric-value">+18%</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ===== PROBLEMA ===== -->
<section class="problem section-dark bg-meeting-1">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">El problema</div>
      <h2>Tu empresa podría estar perdiendo dinero sin saberlo</h2>
      <p>La mayoría de empresas cree que pierde dinero por desperdicio. En realidad, muchas pierden más por mala planificación, decisiones sin datos y procesos que nunca se midieron.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="problem-grid reveal-stagger">
      <div class="problem-card on-dark">
        <div class="problem-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 3v18h18"/><path d="M18.7 8 13 13.7l-4-4L3 16"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Sin indicadores claros</h3>
        <p>Decisiones tomadas a partir de percepciones, no de datos reales de planta.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card on-dark">
        <div class="problem-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M9 9h6v6H9z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Pérdidas invisibles</h3>
        <p>Inventarios, tiempos muertos y compras urgentes que erosionan el margen mes a mes.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card on-dark">
        <div class="problem-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 6v6l4 2"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Mejora sin continuidad</h3>
        <p>Iniciativas que arrancan con fuerza pero se pierden por falta de seguimiento.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ===== SERVICIOS / ESCALERA DE VALOR ===== -->
<section class="services section-light-photo bg-meeting-light-1" id="servicios">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">Escalera de valor</div>
      <h2>Un camino claro hacia la rentabilidad</h2>
      <p>Empezamos con un diagnóstico, avanzamos con un programa de resultados medibles y, si lo decides, te acompañamos como socio de crecimiento permanente.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="ladder reveal-stagger">
      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-tag">Paso 1 · Diagnóstico</div>
        <h3>Diagnóstico de Rentabilidad Operacional™</h3>
        <div class="service-price">USD 499</div>
        <p class="desc">Un análisis a fondo para responder: ¿dónde está perdiendo dinero realmente tu empresa?</p>
        <ul class="service-list">
          <li><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg> IGROK™ — radiografía completa de tu operación</li>
          <li><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg> MCOE™ — mapa de costos ocultos, en cifras</li>
          <li><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg> Roadmap priorizado, listo para ejecutar</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="service-outcome">Sabrás exactamente dónde se te escapa el dinero.</div>
        <a href="https://wa.me/593997199748?text=Hola%2C%20me%20interesa%20el%20Diagn%C3%B3stico%20de%20Rentabilidad%20Operacional" target="_blank" class="service-btn">Quiero mi diagnóstico</a>
      </div>

      <div class="service-card featured">
        <div class="service-badge">El más elegido</div>
        <div class="service-tag">Paso 2 · Resultados</div>
        <h3>Programa de Rentabilidad Operacional™</h3>
        <div class="service-price">USD 990 <small>/mes · 3 meses</small></div>
        <p class="desc">Implementamos los procesos e indicadores para generar ahorro real, medible y sostenido.</p>
        <ul class="service-list">
          <li><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg> Implementación guiada, paso a paso, en tu planta</li>
          <li><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg> Indicadores y tableros de control en tiempo real</li>
          <li><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg> Acompañamiento semanal de un consultor senior</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="service-outcome featured-outcome">Resultado garantizado: ahorro económico cuantificado al cierre del programa.</div>
        <a href="https://wa.me/593997199748?text=Hola%2C%20me%20interesa%20el%20Programa%20de%20Rentabilidad%20Operacional" target="_blank" class="service-btn">Quiero ir con KAIPRO</a>
      </div>

      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-tag">Paso 3 · Continuidad</div>
        <h3>KAIPRO Growth Partner™</h3>
        <div class="service-price">USD 290–790 <small>/mes</small></div>
        <p class="desc">Acompañamiento continuo para sostener la mejora y convertirla en ventaja competitiva.</p>
        <ul class="service-list">
          <li><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg> Seguimiento mensual de indicadores clave</li>
          <li><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg> Mejora continua, sin perder el control</li>
          <li><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg> Plantillas y herramientas siempre actualizadas</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="service-outcome">Tu mejora se convierte en cultura, no en un proyecto que se olvida.</div>
        <a href="https://wa.me/593997199748?text=Hola%2C%20me%20interesa%20conocer%20KAIPRO%20Growth%20Partner" target="_blank" class="service-btn">Quiero ser Growth Partner</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="services-trust reveal">
      <div class="trust-item">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9 12l2 2 4-4"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/></svg>
        Reunión exploratoria sin costo
      </div>
      <div class="trust-item">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9 12l2 2 4-4"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/></svg>
        Sin permanencia forzada
      </div>
      <div class="trust-item">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9 12l2 2 4-4"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/></svg>
        Enfoque 100% en empresas de Azuay
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ===== METODO / JOURNEY ===== -->
<section class="method section-dark bg-meeting-2">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">Nuestro método</div>
      <h2>De "todo está normal" a "lo recomiendo"</h2>
      <p>Cada empresa avanza por las mismas etapas. Te acompañamos en cada una con el producto correcto.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="journey reveal-stagger">
      <div class="journey-step">
        <div class="step-num">Exploración</div>
        <h4>"Necesito entenderlo"</h4>
        <p>Reunión exploratoria sin costo para entender dónde está el problema real.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="journey-step">
        <div class="step-num">Decisión</div>
        <h4>"Debo corregirlo"</h4>
        <p>El Diagnóstico revela las pérdidas y prioriza el plan de acción.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="journey-step">
        <div class="step-num">Transformación</div>
        <h4>"Ahora tenemos control"</h4>
        <p>El Programa implementa procesos, indicadores y mejora continua.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="journey-step">
        <div class="step-num">Consolidación</div>
        <h4>"No quiero perderlo"</h4>
        <p>Growth Partner sostiene los resultados y los convierte en cultura.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ===== SOBRE NOSOTROS ===== -->
<section class="section-light-photo bg-meeting-light-2" id="nosotros">
  <div class="container about-grid">
    <div class="about-text reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">Sobre nosotros</div>
      <h2 style="font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,38px); margin-bottom:14px;">Rentabilidad operacional para empresas de alimentos y manufactura en Ecuador</h2>
      <p>En KAIPRO Consulting ayudamos a empresas de alimentos y manufactura a identificar y eliminar pérdidas operacionales mediante procesos, indicadores y mejora continua, generando decisiones basadas en datos y resultados económicos sostenibles.</p>
      <p>Trabajamos con dueños, gerentes generales, gerentes de operaciones y jefes de producción de empresas con 20 a 100 colaboradores en Azuay, con un enfoque simple, práctico y orientado a resultados.</p>
      <div class="principles">
        <div class="principle">Orientación a resultados</div>
        <div class="principle">Decisiones basadas en datos</div>
        <div class="principle">Simplicidad y practicidad</div>
        <div class="principle">Mejora continua</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="founders reveal" style="transition-delay:0.15s">
      <div class="founder-card">
        <div class="founder-avatar"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Franklin Tusa"></div>
        <div class="founder-info">
          <h4>Franklin Tusa</h4>
          <p>Fundador · KAIPRO Consulting</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="founder-card">
        <div class="founder-avatar"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Adrián Salamea"></div>
        <div class="founder-info">
          <h4>Adrián Salamea</h4>
          <p>Socio · KAIPRO Consulting</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ===== CONTACTO ===== -->
<section class="contact" id="contacto">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="contact-card reveal">
      <div>
        <h2>Hablemos de tu operación</h2>
        <p>Agenda una reunión exploratoria sin costo de 30-45 minutos. Hablamos de dónde crees que tu empresa pierde dinero y qué indicadores usas hoy.</p>
        <div class="contact-actions">
          <a href="https://wa.me/593997199748?text=Hola%2C%20quiero%20agendar%20una%20reuni%C3%B3n%20exploratoria%20con%20KAIPRO" target="_blank" class="contact-channel">
            <div class="ic">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12.04 2C6.58 2 2.13 6.45 2.13 11.91c0 1.75.46 3.45 1.32 4.95L2 22l5.25-1.38c1.45.79 3.08 1.21 4.78 1.21h.01c5.46 0 9.91-4.45 9.91-9.91 0-2.65-1.03-5.14-2.9-7.01A9.82 9.82 0 0 0 12.04 2m0 1.67c2.2 0 4.26.86 5.82 2.42a8.18 8.18 0 0 1 2.41 5.82c0 4.55-3.7 8.24-8.24 8.24-1.48 0-2.93-.39-4.19-1.15l-.3-.17-3.12.82.83-3.04-.2-.32a8.18 8.18 0 0 1-1.26-4.38c0-4.55 3.7-8.24 8.25-8.24M8.53 7.33c-.16 0-.42.06-.64.3-.23.24-.87.85-.87 2.07 0 1.22.89 2.4 1.01 2.57.13.16 1.76 2.83 4.43 3.85 2.21.85 2.66.7 3.14.66.48-.05 1.55-.63 1.77-1.25.22-.62.22-1.14.15-1.25-.06-.11-.23-.18-.48-.31-.25-.13-1.55-.77-1.79-.85-.24-.09-.42-.13-.59.13-.18.26-.68.85-.83 1.03-.15.17-.31.19-.56.06-.26-.13-1.07-.4-2.04-1.26-.75-.67-1.26-1.5-1.41-1.75-.15-.25-.02-.39.11-.52.13-.13.29-.34.43-.51.14-.17.19-.3.29-.49.1-.19.05-.36-.02-.51-.07-.15-.66-1.59-.89-2.07-.18-.39-.36-.39-.51-.4z"/></svg>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div class="ch-label">WhatsApp</div>
              <div class="ch-value">+593 98 765 4321</div>
            </div>
          </a>
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/" target="_blank" class="contact-channel">
            <div class="ic">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M20.45 20.45h-3.55v-5.57c0-1.33-.02-3.03-1.85-3.03-1.86 0-2.14 1.45-2.14 2.94v5.66H9.36V9h3.41v1.56h.05c.48-.9 1.64-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.6 0 4.27 2.37 4.27 5.45v6.29zM5.34 7.43a2.06 2.06 0 1 1 0-4.12 2.06 2.06 0 0 1 0 4.12zM7.12 20.45H3.56V9h3.56v11.45z"/></svg>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div class="ch-label">LinkedIn</div>
              <div class="ch-value">KAIPRO Consulting</div>
            </div>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-side">
        <div class="k-mini-wrap">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 200 160" width="160" role="img" aria-label="Marca KAIPRO">
            <rect x="50" y="20" width="35" height="100" rx="6" fill="#5fd3ee" opacity="0.9"/>
            <path d="M62 98 L102 58 L116 58" fill="none" stroke="#5fd3ee" stroke-width="14" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.9"/>
            <path d="M62 125 L135 52" fill="none" stroke="#1aa7c7" stroke-width="16" stroke-linecap="round"/>
            <path d="M126 40 L149 33 L142 56 Z" fill="#1aa7c7"/>
            <line x1="114" y1="89" x2="136" y2="111" stroke="#1aa7c7" stroke-width="3"/>
            <circle cx="114" cy="89" r="6.5" fill="#1aa7c7"/>
            <circle cx="136" cy="111" r="10" fill="#1aa7c7"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="ideal-client">
          <strong>¿Es KAIPRO para tu empresa?</strong><br>
          Empresas de alimentos y manufactura con 20 a 100 colaboradores en Azuay, donde dueños, gerencias o jefaturas de producción buscan más control y rentabilidad.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ===== FOOTER ===== -->
<footer>
  <div class="container footer-row">
    <span class="brand-text">KAI<span style="color:var(--teal)">PRO</span> Consulting</span>
    <span class="footer-tag">Menos desperdicio. Más rentabilidad. © 2026</span>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- ===== WHATSAPP FLOTANTE ===== -->
<a href="https://wa.me/593997199748?text=Hola%2C%20quiero%20m%C3%A1s%20informaci%C3%B3n%20sobre%20KAIPRO%20Consulting" target="_blank" class="wa-float" aria-label="Escribir por WhatsApp">
  <span class="wa-ping" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12.04 2C6.58 2 2.13 6.45 2.13 11.91c0 1.75.46 3.45 1.32 4.95L2 22l5.25-1.38c1.45.79 3.08 1.21 4.78 1.21h.01c5.46 0 9.91-4.45 9.91-9.91 0-2.65-1.03-5.14-2.9-7.01A9.82 9.82 0 0 0 12.04 2m0 1.67c2.2 0 4.26.86 5.82 2.42a8.18 8.18 0 0 1 2.41 5.82c0 4.55-3.7 8.24-8.24 8.24-1.48 0-2.93-.39-4.19-1.15l-.3-.17-3.12.82.83-3.04-.2-.32a8.18 8.18 0 0 1-1.26-4.38c0-4.55 3.7-8.24 8.25-8.24M8.53 7.33c-.16 0-.42.06-.64.3-.23.24-.87.85-.87 2.07 0 1.22.89 2.4 1.01 2.57.13.16 1.76 2.83 4.43 3.85 2.21.85 2.66.7 3.14.66.48-.05 1.55-.63 1.77-1.25.22-.62.22-1.14.15-1.25-.06-.11-.23-.18-.48-.31-.25-.13-1.55-.77-1.79-.85-.24-.09-.42-.13-.59.13-.18.26-.68.85-.83 1.03-.15.17-.31.19-.56.06-.26-.13-1.07-.4-2.04-1.26-.75-.67-1.26-1.5-1.41-1.75-.15-.25-.02-.39.11-.52.13-.13.29-.34.43-.51.14-.17.19-.3.29-.49.1-.19.05-.36-.02-.51-.07-.15-.66-1.59-.89-2.07-.18-.39-.36-.39-.51-.4z"/></svg>
  WhatsApp
</a>

<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
    var targets = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-stagger');
    if(!('IntersectionObserver' in window)){
      targets.forEach(function(el){ el.classList.add('is-visible'); });
      return;
    }
    var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
      entries.forEach(function(entry){
        if(entry.isIntersecting){
          entry.target.classList.add('is-visible');
          observer.unobserve(entry.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.15, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
    targets.forEach(function(el){ observer.observe(el); });
  });

  // Mobile menu toggle
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
    var toggle = document.querySelector('.menu-toggle');
    var nav = document.querySelector('.nav-links');
    if(toggle && nav){
      toggle.addEventListener('click', function(){
        var isOpen = nav.classList.toggle('open');
        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isOpen);
      });
    }
  });
</script>
</body>
</html>
